case_title: ZENITH INSURANCE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION vs. A TATE OF HONG KONG, INC et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZENITH INSURANCE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT A TATE OF HONG KONG, INC DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-16-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-17-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-27-1993
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: STERNBERG, DONALD E SUBSTITUTED FOR MORANTZ, LEWIS S AS ATTORNEY FOR ZENITH INSURANCE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-16-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-16-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
